---
title: "Rscience - Hidden Runner"
format: 
  html: 
    output-file: "RUNNER.html"
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h1, h2, .title {
          border-bottom: none !important;
          margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        </style>
execute: 
  enabled: true
---

Tool: Rs003_LM_QQ_FIX_BAL_ANOVA_1Way_s001  
File name qmd: fn05_RUNNER.qmd
File name html: fn05_RUNNER.html


```{r step00_time_start, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Captura del tiempo inicial
time_start <- Sys.time()

cat("<b>Runner Execution Started:</b>", format(time_start, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "<br>")
cat("<hr>")
```


```{r eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Libraries
library("fs")
library("knitr")
library("tidyverse")
library("kableExtra")

# Funtions
# Funtions
source(file = "../AAA_fn/fn_actions.R")
source(file = "../AAA_fn/fn_extract.R")
source(file = "../AAA_fn/fn_run.R")
```

---

```{r basics, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Files
   str_file_stone_html <- "RUNNER.html"
   str_regex_remove_html_files <- ".html$"
   str_file_name_Rscript_external <- "zzz_output_f03_gen_Rscript_external.R"
   
# Folders
   str_folder_output_external <- "../zzz_zzz_output"
   str_folder_output_local    <- "zzz_output_local"

# Paths
   str_Rscript_external_path_EXTERNAL    <- file.path(str_folder_output_external, str_file_name_Rscript_external)
   str_Rscript_external_path_LOCAL    <- file.path(str_folder_output_local, str_file_name_Rscript_external)


   

```

```{r step02_01_0522551, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
step_download_script <- function(script_path) {
  library("base64enc")
  library("fs")

  if (!fs::file_exists(script_path)) return(NULL)

  file_name <- fs::path_file(script_path)
  # file_name <- "Rscript_analysis.R"
  # 1. Leer y codificar el archivo en Base64
  # Esto incrusta el archivo dentro del HTML para descarga offline
  raw_bytes <- base::readBin(script_path, "raw", n = fs::file_info(script_path)$size)
  base64_string <- base64enc::base64encode(raw_bytes)
  
  # 2. Crear el enlace de descarga con estilo de botón
  # El atributo 'download' fuerza la descarga en lugar de abrirlo
  download_link <- paste0(
    "<a href='data:application/octet-stream;base64,", base64_string, "' ",
    "download='", file_name, "' style='",
    "background-color: #007bff; color: white; padding: 8px 16px; ",
    "text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold; ",
    "display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 13px;'>",
    "<span>📥 Download Original Script: </span><code>", file_name, "</code></a><br><br>"
  )
  
  base::cat(download_link)
}

# Ejecución (ubicar antes del visualizador de código)
# step_download_script(str_Rscript_external_path_LOCAL)
step_download_script(str_Rscript_external_path_EXTERNAL)
```




```{r step02_01_05551, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

step_show_code <- function(script_path) {
  # 1. Verification
  if (!fs::file_exists(script_path)) {
    cat("<span style='color: #dc3545;'>✘ <b>Error:</b> Script not found for display.</span><br>")
    return(FALSE)
  }

  # 2. Header
  cat("<b>Source Code Audit:</b><br>")
  cat(paste0("<small style='color: #6c757d; font-style: italic;'>File: ", fs::path_file(script_path), "</small><br><br>"))

  # 3. Read Code
  code_content <- base::readLines(script_path, warn = FALSE)
  
  # 4. Generate Collapsible HTML Block with Syntax Highlighting
  # We use the 'details' tag and a manual markdown code block inside
  cat("<details style='border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px; padding: 10px; background-color: #fcfcfc;'>")
  cat("<summary style='cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; color: #007bff;'>Click to expand / collapse script source code</summary>")
  cat("\n\n```r\n")
  cat(paste(code_content, collapse = "\n"))
  cat("\n```\n\n")
  cat("</details><br>")
}

# Execution using your local path variable
# step_show_code(str_Rscript_external_path_LOCAL)
step_show_code(str_Rscript_external_path_EXTERNAL)
```

# Final Summary
```{r step_final_time_end, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# 1. Cálculos de tiempo
time_end <- Sys.time()
time_duration <- difftime(time_end, time_start, units = "auto")
str_duration <- format(time_duration, digits = 3)



# 3. Construcción del HTML (Asegurando que no haya espacios extraños al inicio)
html_summary <- paste0(
  "<hr>",
  "<div style='background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; padding: 15px; border-radius: 5px; font-family: sans-serif; color: #333;'>",
  "  <b style='display: block; color: #495057; font-size: 1.1em; margin-bottom: 10px;'>🏁 Final Execution Summary</b>",
  "  <div style='margin-bottom: 5px;'>🕒 <b>Start Time:</b> ", format(time_start, "%H:%M:%S"), "</div>",
  "  <div style='margin-bottom: 5px;'>🏁 <b>End Time:&nbsp;</b> ", format(time_end, "%H:%M:%S"), "</div>",
  "  <div style='margin-bottom: 5px;'>⌛ <b>Total Duration:</b> <span style='color: #007bff; font-weight: bold;'>", str_duration, "</span></div>",
  "</div>",
  "<div style='text-align: center; margin-top: 10px;'><small style='color: #6c757d;'>End of Rscience Automated Runner</small></div>"
)

# Usamos cat con fill = TRUE para asegurar que el buffer se limpie correctamente
cat(html_summary, fill = TRUE)
```
